title: Section 17
content: The Tribunal, while hearing and deciding an appeal under section 15, shall have the power-- (a) to order production of documents or exhibits connected with the proceedings before the court martial; (b) to order the attendance of the witnesses; (c) to receive evidence; (d) to obtain reports from Court martial; (e) order reference of any question for enquiry; (f) appoint a person with special expert knowledge to act as an assessor; and (g) to determine any question which is necessary to be determined in order to do justice in the case.
